# Proofd pipeline

<!-- Generated by proofd. Rule ID: proofd-pipeline. Do not edit manually. -->
<!-- Default Prefix: PP | Prefixes: PP -->

- [PP-01] proofd source-reference scans retain line numbers; generated file-scoped rules annotate tags with compact L<n> hints, order entries within each rule section by file line, and entry-files plus select-matching return line-aware source references for agents.
- [PP-02] proofd canonical rule storage strips manual file metadata; generated rule snapshots derive scope from source-tag locations only, and lint warns on rules with no source references.
